Does this employee contribute to SSNIT Pension?

If yes, we’ll deduct and remit their SSNIT Tier 1 & 2 each month.

Yes, enrolled
Deduct SSNIT each month.
Not enrolled
No SSNIT deductions.

Contact Details

Do you have their bank details?

If yes, add them now so they can be paid. If not, we’ll invite the employee to add their own.

Yes, I have them
Add their bank account now.
No, the employee will provide it
They add bank details themselves.
